hypothesis: Among Si–X alloy anodes with theoretical capacity >1500 mAh g−1, those with a total Li+ migration channel radius change ΔRt ≤ 0.20 Å between 0% and 100% state of charge will retain ≥85% of initial capacity after 300 cycles at C/2 in coin cells using 1 M LiPF6 in EC:DEC (1:1) with 10 wt% FEC, whereas alloys with ΔRt > 0.20 Å will retain <70% under identical conditions.
